  "text": "In Apache Beam v2.62.0, the pipeline graph translation layer is split across two locations. The former 'runners/core-construction-java/' module has been merged into 'sdks/java/core/', while 'runners/core-java/' contains runner execution primitives.\n\n**runners/core-java/** — Runner execution primitives:\n- `runners/core-java/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/runners/core/SplittableParDoViaKeyedWorkItems.java` (class: SplittableParDoViaKeyedWorkItems) — Implements PTransformOverrideFactory to translate SplittableParDo into runner-executable keyed work items.\n- `runners/core-java/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/runners/core/construction/SerializablePipelineOptions.java` (class: SerializablePipelineOptions) — Serializes pipeline options for the construction/translation layer.\n\n**TransformHierarchy walker** (now in sdks/java/core, formerly runners/core-construction-java):\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/TransformHierarchy.java` (class: TransformHierarchy) — The central pipeline-graph walker. Maintains the tree of composite and primitive transforms, and exposes a visitor API (PipelineVisitor) used by all runner translators to traverse the DAG.\n\n**PTransformOverride mechanism** (now in sdks/java/core):\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverride.java` (class: PTransformOverride) — Data class pairing a PTransformMatcher with a PTransformOverrideFactory; Pipeline.replaceAll() walks the hierarchy applying these overrides before translation.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverrideFactory.java` (interface: PTransformOverrideFactory) — Interface every runner-specific replacement factory must implement, producing a PTransformReplacement.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PTransformMatchers.java` (class: PTransformMatchers) — Factory methods for common PTransformMatcher predicates (splittableParDo, classEqualTo, urnEqualTo, etc.).\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PTransformTranslation.java` (class: PTransformTranslation) — Registry mapping PTransform subclasses to their RunnerApi URNs and payload translators.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PTransformReplacements.java` (class: PTransformReplacements) — Helpers to build ReplacementOutput maps when wiring override outputs back to the graph.\n\n**PipelineTranslation** (Runner-API / proto serialization of the whole pipeline):\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PipelineTranslation.java` (class: PipelineTranslation) — Converts a Java Pipeline object to/from the RunnerApi.Pipeline proto used by portable runners.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/SdkComponents.java` (class: SdkComponents) — Accumulates all coders, windowing strategies, environments and transforms referenced during proto translation.\n\n**ExecutableStagePayload construction** (grouping transforms into portable execution units):\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ExecutableStageTranslation.java` (class: ExecutableStageTranslation) — Extracts an ExecutableStagePayload proto from an applied transform whose spec URN is 'beam:runner:executable_stage:v1'.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ExecutableStage.java` (interface: ExecutableStage) — Defines the contract for a fused group of transforms that share an environment; toPTransform() serialises it to ExecutableStagePayload.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ImmutableExecutableStage.java` (class: ImmutableExecutableStage) — Concrete immutable implementation of ExecutableStage.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/GreedyPipelineFuser.java` (class: GreedyPipelineFuser) — Entry point: walks a QueryablePipeline and greedily fuses compatible transforms into ExecutableStages.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/GreedyStageFuser.java` (class: GreedyStageFuser) — Fuses a single root transform with compatible downstream transforms into one ExecutableStage.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/FusedPipeline.java` (class: FusedPipeline) — Result of pipeline fusion: a set of ExecutableStages plus the runner-executed root transforms.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/QueryablePipeline.java` (class: QueryablePipeline) — Wraps a RunnerApi.Pipeline and provides graph-query helpers used during fusion.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/PipelineValidator.java` (class: PipelineValidator) — Validates proto pipeline structure, including ExecutableStagePayload consistency.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ProtoOverrides.java` (class: ProtoOverrides) — Proto-level equivalent of PTransformOverride; replaces URN-matched transforms in the RunnerApi graph.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/SplittableParDoExpander.java` (class: SplittableParDoExpander) — Expands splittable DoFns in the proto pipeline graph before fusion.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/SideInputReference.java` (class: SideInputReference) — Models a side-input reference inside an ExecutableStagePayload.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/UserStateReference.java` (class: UserStateReference) — Models a user-state reference inside an ExecutableStagePayload.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/TimerReference.java` (class: TimerReference) — Models a timer reference inside an ExecutableStagePayload.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/PipelineNode.java` (class: PipelineNode) — Typed nodes (PTransformNode, PCollectionNode, etc.) used in the graph representation.\n\n**BoundedSource / UnboundedSource adapter classes**:\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource.java` (classes: UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource, BoundedToUnboundedSourceAdapter) — Wraps a BoundedSource as an UnboundedSource so it can be consumed by streaming runners; this is the primary bounded-to-unbounded adapter in the construction layer.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ReadTranslation.java` (class: ReadTranslation) — Translates Read.from(BoundedSource) and Read.from(UnboundedSource) to/from their RunnerApi representations, including payload encoding for both source types.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/SplittableParDo.java` (class: SplittableParDo) — Contains the OverrideFactory that replaces Read.from(BoundedSource) with a splittable DoFn-based primitive; also handles unbounded-from-bounded conversion."
}

  "text": "In Apache Beam v2.62.0, the pipeline graph translation layer is split across two locations. The former 'runners/core-construction-java/' module has been merged into 'sdks/java/core/', while 'runners/core-java/' contains runner execution primitives.\n\n**runners/core-java/** — Runner execution primitives:\n- `runners/core-java/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/runners/core/SplittableParDoViaKeyedWorkItems.java` (class: SplittableParDoViaKeyedWorkItems) — Implements PTransformOverrideFactory to translate SplittableParDo into runner-executable keyed work items.\n- `runners/core-java/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/runners/core/construction/SerializablePipelineOptions.java` (class: SerializablePipelineOptions) — Serializes pipeline options for the construction/translation layer.\n\n**TransformHierarchy walker** (now in sdks/java/core, formerly runners/core-construction-java):\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/TransformHierarchy.java` (class: TransformHierarchy) — The central pipeline-graph walker. Maintains the tree of composite and primitive transforms, and exposes a visitor API (PipelineVisitor) used by all runner translators to traverse the DAG.\n\n**PTransformOverride mechanism** (now in sdks/java/core):\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverride.java` (class: PTransformOverride) — Data class pairing a PTransformMatcher with a PTransformOverrideFactory; Pipeline.replaceAll() walks the hierarchy applying these overrides before translation.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/runners/PTransformOverrideFactory.java` (interface: PTransformOverrideFactory) — Interface every runner-specific replacement factory must implement, producing a PTransformReplacement.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PTransformMatchers.java` (class: PTransformMatchers) — Factory methods for common PTransformMatcher predicates (splittableParDo, classEqualTo, urnEqualTo, etc.).\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PTransformTranslation.java` (class: PTransformTranslation) — Registry mapping PTransform subclasses to their RunnerApi URNs and payload translators.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PTransformReplacements.java` (class: PTransformReplacements) — Helpers to build ReplacementOutput maps when wiring override outputs back to the graph.\n\n**PipelineTranslation** (Runner-API / proto serialization of the whole pipeline):\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/PipelineTranslation.java` (class: PipelineTranslation) — Converts a Java Pipeline object to/from the RunnerApi.Pipeline proto used by portable runners.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/SdkComponents.java` (class: SdkComponents) — Accumulates all coders, windowing strategies, environments and transforms referenced during proto translation.\n\n**ExecutableStagePayload construction** (grouping transforms into portable execution units):\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ExecutableStageTranslation.java` (class: ExecutableStageTranslation) — Extracts an ExecutableStagePayload proto from an applied transform whose spec URN is 'beam:runner:executable_stage:v1'.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ExecutableStage.java` (interface: ExecutableStage) — Defines the contract for a fused group of transforms that share an environment; toPTransform() serialises it to ExecutableStagePayload.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ImmutableExecutableStage.java` (class: ImmutableExecutableStage) — Concrete immutable implementation of ExecutableStage.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/GreedyPipelineFuser.java` (class: GreedyPipelineFuser) — Entry point: walks a QueryablePipeline and greedily fuses compatible transforms into ExecutableStages.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/GreedyStageFuser.java` (class: GreedyStageFuser) — Fuses a single root transform with compatible downstream transforms into one ExecutableStage.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/FusedPipeline.java` (class: FusedPipeline) — Result of pipeline fusion: a set of ExecutableStages plus the runner-executed root transforms.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/QueryablePipeline.java` (class: QueryablePipeline) — Wraps a RunnerApi.Pipeline and provides graph-query helpers used during fusion.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/PipelineValidator.java` (class: PipelineValidator) — Validates proto pipeline structure, including ExecutableStagePayload consistency.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/ProtoOverrides.java` (class: ProtoOverrides) — Proto-level equivalent of PTransformOverride; replaces URN-matched transforms in the RunnerApi graph.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/SplittableParDoExpander.java` (class: SplittableParDoExpander) — Expands splittable DoFns in the proto pipeline graph before fusion.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/SideInputReference.java` (class: SideInputReference) — Models a side-input reference inside an ExecutableStagePayload.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/UserStateReference.java` (class: UserStateReference) — Models a user-state reference inside an ExecutableStagePayload.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/TimerReference.java` (class: TimerReference) — Models a timer reference inside an ExecutableStagePayload.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/graph/PipelineNode.java` (class: PipelineNode) — Typed nodes (PTransformNode, PCollectionNode, etc.) used in the graph representation.\n\n**BoundedSource / UnboundedSource adapter classes**:\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource.java` (classes: UnboundedReadFromBoundedSource, BoundedToUnboundedSourceAdapter) — Wraps a BoundedSource as an UnboundedSource so it can be consumed by streaming runners; this is the primary bounded-to-unbounded adapter in the construction layer.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/ReadTranslation.java` (class: ReadTranslation) — Translates Read.from(BoundedSource) and Read.from(UnboundedSource) to/from their RunnerApi representations, including payload encoding for both source types.\n- `sdks/java/core/src/main/java/org/apache/beam/sdk/util/construction/SplittableParDo.java` (class: SplittableParDo) — Contains the OverrideFactory that replaces Read.from(BoundedSource) with a splittable DoFn-based primitive; also handles unbounded-from-bounded conversion."
}
